name: DischargeGuard Monitoring Agent
description: Conducts post-discharge patient check-ins with diagnosis-specific symptom questions. Extracts clinical entities from patient responses using Amazon Comprehend Medical NLP.

skills.name: Patient Check-In
skills.description: Initiate a diagnosis-specific symptom check-in for a post-discharge patient. Returns structured check-in results with extracted clinical entities and red flags.
examples: Conduct a check-in for patient P001 with heart failure on day 3
Check on patient P002 recovering from pneumonia on day 7

skills.name: Symptom Entity Extraction
skills.description: Extract clinical entities from free-text patient symptom reports using Amazon Comprehend Medical.
examples: Extract symptoms from: 'I gained 3 pounds overnight and my ankles are puffy'
